data.title: ISEA praises Trump Administration for restoring NIOSH staff, preserving worker safety programs by reinstating hundreds of employees.
data.description: In Arlington, Virginia, on January 15, 2026, the International Safety Equipment Association (ISEA) praised the Trump Administration for undoing significant reductions in staffing at the National Institute for Occupational Safety and Health (NIOSH). This decision led to the rehiring of hundreds of employees, benefiting the overall safety and well-being of workers.

data.title: USITC finds imports of fresh mushrooms from Canada have materially injured U.S. producers, giving advantage to the domestic industry.
data.description: On January 15, 2026, the U.S. International Trade Commission (USITC) revealed that imports of fresh Agaricus mushrooms from Canada have caused significant harm to U.S. producers. This decision, supported unanimously, constitutes a preliminary determination. The USITC's findings point to a material injury suffered by domestic producers due to these imported fresh mushrooms. This development could have implications for the trade relationship between the two countries.

data.title: Rockefeller Foundation premieres "FOOD 2050" documentary in LA focusing on feeding 10 billion people. Narrated by Viola Davis.
data.description: On January 15, 2026, in Los Angeles, the Rockefeller Foundation, along with Media RED and Food Tank, unveiled FOOD 2050, a documentary narrated by Viola Davis. This film addresses solutions to a crucial global issue.

data.title: $4M Filecoin (FIL) ProPGF Batch 2 announces 14-member committee; 100+ applications to be reviewed for final decisions by late January 2026.
data.description: Selection committee for Filecoin (FIL)'s $4M ProPGF Batch 2 funding program announced as over 100 applications are being reviewed. Final decisions on the selected projects are anticipated to be made by late January 2026.

data.title: Yen weakens to July 2024 lows, Japanese stocks surge to record highs as currency slips past 159 against USD.
data.description: The article discusses the resurfacing market dynamic in Japan where a weakening yen is leading to a rally in domestic equities. The Japanese yen hit its lowest level since July 2024 against the US dollar, while domestic stocks reached record highs. Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi's potential dissolution of parliament and support for expansionary fiscal policy have contributed to the yen's decline. Meanwhile, Japanese equities surged, with the Nikkei 225 futures rallying 3.1% and closing at record highs. Companies like Toyota Motor Co. and Mitsubishi UFJ Financial Group Inc. saw significant gains. The article is available on Benzinga.com for full details.

data.title: Coinbase CEO predicts market structure bill markup in weeks, unable to back bill as is, might delay the process.
data.description: Late on a Wednesday, Brian Armstrong announced on social media that Coinbase could not endorse the bill in its current form, possibly delaying its consideration.

data.title: Patero introduces workshop to uncover cryptographic risk, helping organizations define scope. Important number: U.S. National Security Memorandum-10.
data.description: Patero, a leading expert in post-quantum cryptography (PQC), has introduced its Cryptographic Inventory Workshop to aid organizations in swiftly outlining scope, aligning stakeholders, and establishing a feasible strategy for implementing a cryptographic inventory. This initiative serves as a crucial initial phase in post-quantum transition planning. Notably, government mandates like U.S. National Security Memorandum-10 (NSM-10) are expediting the preparation process. The workshop aims to streamline the transition by assisting companies in efficiently preparing for the onset of post-quantum cryptography.

data.title: ERNIE 5 AI by Baidu is now ranked #8 globally on LMArena, the only Chinese model in the top 10, surpassing GPT 5.1.
data.description: Baidu's latest model, ERNIE-5.0-0110, has achieved the impressive rank of #8 globally on LMArena. Notably, it is the sole Chinese model to be featured in the top 10 rankings. ERNIE-5.0-0110 has surpassed GPT-5.1-High in performance, establishing its superiority in the field.

data.title: Skilled workers turn to technology due to workforce shortages and codes & standards rollbacks, NFPA reveals in report.
data.description: In Quincy, Massachusetts, on January 15, 2026, the National Fire Protection Association (NFPA) announced the release of its annual report on the "State of the Skilled Trades". The NFPA, a leading organization in fire, life safety, and electrical hazard prevention, has created over 300 codes and standards globally.

data.title: DIAGNOS engages IBN for corporate communication and awareness solutions - using AI - on Jan 15, 2026.
data.description: The news from BROSSARD, Quebec on January 15, 2026, reveals that Diagnos Inc., a leader in early detection of health issues through Artificial Intelligence technology, has partnered with Investor Brand Network (IBN) for corporate communication and awareness services. Diagnos, trading with identifiers TSX Venture: ADK, OTCQB: DGNOF, FWB: 4D4A, aims to enhance its outreach and engagement through this collaboration.
